title: NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for DEO, Cluster Supervisor and More Posts
org: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka)
shortInfo: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka) Taluk Program Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 12-05-2026 on the official website of National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka . A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the NRLM Karnataka Taluk Program Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 50 years who have a Post Graduate Degree / PG Diploma or Graduate qualification are eligible to apply for these Taluk Program Manager vacancies. The online application process for NRLM Karnataka Taluk Program Manager Recruitment 2026 has started on 12-

basic_details.job_title: NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for DEO, Cluster Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka)
basic_details.short_information: National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka (NRLM Karnataka) Taluk Program Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 12-05-2026 on the official website of National Rural Livelihoods Mission Karnataka . A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the NRLM Karnataka Taluk Program Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 50 years who have a Post Graduate Degree / PG Diploma or Graduate qualification are eligible to apply for these Taluk Program Manager vacancies. The online application process for NRLM Karnataka Taluk Program Manager Recruitment 2026 has started on 12-

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree / PG Diploma, Graduate
qualification.details: Taluk Program Manager: Full time Post Graduate Degree (2 Years) / PG Diploma Cluster Supervisor: Graduate DEO/MIS Coordinator: Graduate in Professional / Any Post graduation

selection_process: The selection process details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for more information.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NRLM Karnataka to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 is 31 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years. Specific age relaxations, if any, are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Taluk Program Manager?
faq.answer: For the Taluk Program Manager post, candidates must possess a Full-time Post Graduate Degree (2 Years) or a PG Diploma. This is a key requirement for eligibility.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any application fees for NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026. This makes the application process more accessible to all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for all the mentioned posts, including Taluk Program Manager, Cluster Supervisor, and DEO/MIS Coordinator, is between Rs. 18000 to Rs. 20500 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026. The vacancies are distributed among different posts as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NRLM Karnataka Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions advertised by NRLM Karnataka is Contractual. This means the employment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Karnataka apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The provided data indicates that the recruitment is for eligible candidates in Karnataka. It is advisable to check the official notification for specific domicile requirements.
